hero.title: Your transfer, anywhere in Tunisia
hero.subtitle: Book your transfer between airports and cities in minutes. Professional drivers, transparent prices, instant confirmation.

features.title: Why choose our service?
features.subtitle: A reliable, transparent transfer service tailored to all your needs
features.f1_desc: Receive your confirmation and reference in seconds by email
features.f2_desc: We cover all airports and cities: Tunis, Sousse, Djerba, Sfax...
features.f3_desc: Eco, Comfort, or Van depending on your group size and preferences
features.f4_desc: Arabic, French, English, German, or Italian for your comfort
features.f5_desc: No hidden fees. Fixed price calculated before booking
features.f6_desc: Your driver tracks your flight and adjusts in case of delay

footer.desc: Professional transfer service — All of Tunisia

step3.extraBaggageDesc: Check this if you have more luggage than usual

confirmation.title: Booking Confirmed!
confirmation.emailSent: A confirmation email has been sent with all the details of your transfer.
confirmation.keepReference: Keep this reference — it will be required for any modifications
confirmation.s1_desc: Check your inbox (and spam folder) for the confirmation email
confirmation.s2_desc: Our team will contact you to validate the final details
confirmation.s3_desc: The driver will be at your pickup point at the scheduled time
confirmation.s4_desc: Payment is made directly with your driver
